title: Raccoon Removal in Clifton, Staten Island | $900 - $4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Clifton, Staten Island. Licensed experts handle raccoon infestations safely and humanely. Call Best Pest Control NYC today for a free quote!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Clifton, Staten Island, where these intelligent nocturnal animals seek shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces of residential homes. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal services throughout Clifton, from the tree-lined streets near Clifton Park to properties along Targee Street. Our humane removal process ensures raccoons are safely excluded from your property while preventing future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Clifton residents for years with licensed, insured technicians who understand Staten Island's unique wildlife challenges. We offer transparent pricing ($900 - $4,000 depending on infestation severity), same-day emergency response, and comprehensive exclusion work with warranties to ensure raccoons don't return.
localContext: Clifton's mature trees, proximity to parks like Clifton Playground and Von Briesen Park, and mix of single-family homes and apartment buildings create ideal conditions for raccoon activity. The neighborhood's residential character means raccoons often find easy access to garbage, gardens, and structural entry points in older homes near the Moravian Cemetery area.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Clifton, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Clifton typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on factors like the number of raccoons, location of the nest, extent of damage, and necessary repairs. A single raccoon in an accessible attic may cost $900-$1,500, while a mother with babies or extensive entry point sealing can reach $3,000-$4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Clifton, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in Clifton due to the neighborhood's abundant trees, parks, and residential properties that provide food and shelter. The area's proximity to green spaces like Clifton Park and mature landscaping creates ideal raccoon habitat. Residents frequently encounter raccoons raiding garbage cans, nesting in attics and chimneys, or foraging in yards, especially during spring when mothers seek denning sites.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Clifton home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout Clifton and can typically begin the removal process within 24 hours of your call. The complete removal timeline varies: simple exclusions may take 2-3 days, while cases involving babies require 4-6 weeks to ensure all raccoons are safely removed before sealing entry points. We'll provide a specific timeline after inspecting your property.

faqs.question: Do you handle raccoon damage repairs in Clifton homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, our Clifton raccoon removal service includes complete restoration work. We repair damaged insulation, replace contaminated materials, fix entry points in soffits and roofing, seal chimneys, and restore any structural damage. We also provide attic decontamination and sanitization to remove hazardous droppings and urine. All repairs come with warranties to prevent future raccoon intrusions.
